_comment: Gate 6 — live Vercel deploy evidence. DEMO MODE: static frontend + serverless only. The DeepSeek call runs server-side in a Vercel serverless function; the API key is set as an encrypted Vercel env var, never in client code. Browser-verified live.

browser_verified.overview: KPIs + threat chart + autonomous action feed (incl. 'held below >=2 rule' recommendation) + autonomy dial render
browser_verified.incident: blast-radius map (status by icon+label), fused signals, timeline (audit-bound-before-command), recovery panel
browser_verified.generate: clicked 'Generate incident report' -> live DeepSeek -> Faithfulness 1 + 7 playbook-cited steps + 'model deepseek-v4-pro · LIVE · advisory only (never emits an action)'
